name: Omid
description: Omid was Iran's first domestically launched satellite, launched by the Safir-2 rocket. It was a telecommunications satellite that orbited Earth for approximately 2 months.

name: Rasad-1
description: Rasad-1 was an Iranian imaging satellite launched by the Safir-B1 rocket. It was designed for Earth observation and operated for about 3 weeks.

name: Noor-1
description: Noor-1 was Iran's first military satellite, launched by the Qased rocket. It was placed into orbit 425 km above Earth's surface.
